description_long: This handbag features a structured, trapezoidal silhouette with a prominent blue color and a central vertical band adorned with a geometric black and blue pattern. The body appears to be made of a smooth, possibly synthetic or leather material, while the handles are rounded and made of a contrasting tan material, likely leather or faux leather. The top of the bag is closed with a wide flap that folds over and is secured by a central strap, suggesting a flap closure mechanism. The sides of the bag are relatively narrow, and the handles are attached with visible loops, giving the bag a modern, urban look. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for everyday use in city environments. No visible brand logo or additional decorative hardware is present, keeping the aesthetic clean and focused on the patterned detail.
description: A structured blue handbag with a central geometric patterned band, tan rounded handles, and a wide flap closure. The design is modern and functional, with a clean, urban aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue body, central geometric patterned band, tan handles, and the wide flap closure.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile, rolled top flap, and the way the handles loop around the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the same patterned band and handle arrangement, but no visible closure strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and rolled top, mirroring view 1.
attribute_strap_type: Two medium-length rounded tan handles, non-adjustable, attached with loops on each side for hand or elbow carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Wide top flap closure with a central strap, likely secured by a magnetic snap or similar mechanism.
attribute_pattern: Central vertical geometric pattern in black and blue on a solid blue background.
